Al hacer clic en cualquier conductor en: When you click any driver in the table, the side panel automatically includes their individual coaching plan at the top, before the download buttons.
Anticipar el tráfico: acercarse al semáf: Anticipate traffic: approach the traffic light with your foot off the pedal, slow down before a curve. Accelerate progressively instead of short, hard pushes.
Basada en el tipo de evento más frecuent: Based on the driver's most frequent event type (harsh acceleration, braking, turn or overspeed). Includes practical, actionable advice.
Each driver has a unique QR code. When scanned, the shift start is recorded and the vehicle is automatically assigned.
Cada tipo de vehículo muestra sus tres u: Each vehicle type shows its three editable thresholds. Modify only the ones you need.
Cada tipo tiene un nombre técnico en el: Each type has a technical name in the system, but the same vehicle is called differently depending on the country. In the section
Calcula la aceleración a partir del camb: It calculates acceleration from the change in speed. No additional hardware required.
Compara el score promedio de su flota co: Compares your fleet's average score against the selected sector's average. Green indicator if it beats the benchmark, red if below.
Compare los valores actuales con los sug: Compare the current values with the suggested ones. Values in green are more permissive; in red, stricter.

Ctrl+clic para seleccionar varios. Sin s: Ctrl+click to select several. No selection = access to all.

Debajo del podio aparece la clasificació: Below the podium appears the full ranking of all drivers with:
Diseñado para cualquier vehículo que tra: Designed for any vehicle that transports minors — school buses, minibuses, pickups and university or staff transport vehicles.
El costo mensual por conductor rastreado: The monthly cost per tracked driver is the same per unit as your active tracking devices. It applies from the activation day.
El mismo vehículo, distintos nombres seg: The same vehicle, different names by country
El supervisor abre la misma URL de Drive: The supervisor opens the same DriveIQ URL but adding
El supervisor recibe un acceso independi: The supervisor receives independent access. Changing their password or deleting them does not affect the manager's account.
Elija el sector de referencia más cercan: Choose the reference sector closest to your operation: Logistics and distribution, School transport, Heavy haul, Executive transport, or Field / mining.
En cada tarjeta puede personalizar cómo: On each card you can customize what that vehicle type is called in your region. The custom name will appear in tables, reports and charts instead of the system's technical name.
En el escritorio, Chrome y Edge muestran: On desktop, Chrome and Edge show an install icon in the address bar (⊕ or screen icon). Click it to install DriveIQ as a desktop application.
En la esquina superior derecha del menú: In the top-right corner of the menu there is a bell icon. When there are unread alerts, a red number appears over the bell.
En la esquina superior derecha del topba: In the top-right corner of the topbar you will find the button
Es el evento de mayor impacto en la punt: It is the event with the greatest impact on the score.
Establece el punto a partir del cual un: It sets the point at which a behavior stops being normal and becomes a risk event, based solely on your operation's data.
Esto es útil porque los reportes que se: This is useful because the reports shared with drivers, supervisors or customers are written with the vocabulary everyone recognizes in your country, avoiding confusion. A report that says
Exceso de velocidad, frenada brusca, ace: Overspeed, harsh braking, harsh acceleration, harsh turn. Generates a soft tone and a neutral background.
Frecuencia de incidentes normalizada por: Incident frequency normalized by distance, compared against the sector standard.
Genere informes exportables en PDF, Exce: Generate exportable reports in PDF, Excel, CSV or JSON. Automatic email sending is also configured here.
Hace scroll suave hasta la parte superio: It smoothly scrolls to the top of the page, where the topbar and the section bar are.
Haga clic en \"Asignar vehículo\" y sele: Click "Assign vehicle" and select the unit. The driver is linked instantly.
Real-time notifications icon. The red number indicates new critical events since your last review.

Justo debajo del menú principal encontra: Just below the main menu you will find a bar with quick-access buttons for each section:
La calibración adaptativa resuelve esto:: Adaptive calibration solves this: instead of applying a generic table, the system learns from
La consulta solo ocurre mientras la pest: The check only happens while the tab is active. In the background it consumes no resources.
La estimación GPS es un mínimo: no mide: The GPS estimate is a minimum: it does not measure the legs between events. The actual number of km traveled is always greater than the estimate.
La métrica se muestra en el panel de det: The metric is shown in each driver's detail panel when opened from the table. It appears next to the score and the vs-fleet comparison.
La preferencia se guarda automáticamente: The preference is saved automatically in the browser (
The active section is highlighted in orange. When clicked, the page scrolls smoothly to it.
Las alertas en tiempo real solo funciona: Real-time alerts only work while DriveIQ is open in the browser. They are not operating-system push notifications.
Las tarjetas rojas (Urgente) aparecen pr: The red cards (Urgent) appear first. They are the drivers who need immediate attention.
Los benchmarks son promedios sectoriales: Benchmarks are reference sector averages based on international standards. They do not represent data from other fleets of your customers.
Los perfiles sectoriales establecen umbr: Sector profiles set stricter thresholds than the defaults. This means that
Los perfiles sectoriales se pueden combi: Sector profiles can be combined with adaptive calibration: apply the profile first and then fine-tune with your fleet's data.
Los supervisores ingresan en la misma UR: Supervisors log in at the same DriveIQ URL by adding
Los tipos se sincronizan con el servidor: The types are synced with the server. If you access from another device, the types will already be assigned.
Los tres mejores conductores del período: The top three drivers of the period are shown on a visual podium with gold, silver and bronze medals:
Los umbrales predeterminados de DriveIQ: DriveIQ's default thresholds are a solid starting point, but every operation is unique — and your country's road conditions differ from those of any other region.
Los valores más bajos = más sensible (má: Lower values = more sensitive (more events detected). Higher values = less sensitive. Semi-truck has the strictest thresholds; Motorcycle the most permissive.
Mide directamente la fuerza G en cada ej: It directly measures the G-force on each axis. Greater precision and sensitivity.
Muestra lado a lado el umbral actual y e: It shows the current threshold and the suggested one side by side. You decide which to apply — you can accept all, some or none.
Nuestro motor procesa el historial de co: Our engine processes your fleet's driving history and identifies the patterns of the best-performing operators as a reference for normal driving in your context.
Para que el envío automático funcione, D: For automatic sending to work, DriveIQ must have been open at least once to register the access token on the server. If the app has not been opened that day, the sending is skipped.
PilotOS puede configurarse para cerrar a: PilotOS can be configured to automatically close assignments at a specific time (e.g. midnight).
Plataforma de análisis de conducción e i: Driving analysis and fleet intelligence platform. It measures, ranks and reports each driver's behavior.
Promedio diario de eventos en el período: Daily average of events in the active period. Useful for detecting high-activity weeks.
Radar/barra que muestra en qué días de l: Radar/bar chart showing which days of the week have the most events. It identifies whether Mondays or Fridays are riskier.
Reducir velocidad antes de entrar a la c: Slow down before entering the curve, not inside it. On highways, anticipate lane changes with more time.
Revise el Ranking y el Análisis de tende: Review the Ranking and the Trend Analysis weeks later to measure the impact of the feedback.
Seleccione los vehículos de su grupo (Ct: Select your group's vehicles (Ctrl+click to select several). With no selection, you will have access to all.
Si el vehículo tiene sensor de odómetro: If the vehicle has an odometer sensor configured in the GPS platform, that value is used. It is the most accurate source.
Si hay una hora del día con concentració: If there is a time of day with an abnormal concentration of events, the plan flags that time and suggests greater attention during that stretch.
Si los conductores reciben retroalimenta: If drivers receive feedback about this change, the improvement in the indicators is usually noticeable within the first few weeks.
Si modifica umbrales con datos histórico: If you modify thresholds with historical data loaded, the scores will be recalculated automatically with the new values.
Si un vehículo no tiene conductor asigna: If a vehicle has no driver assigned in PilotOS, DriveIQ shows its plate with the text
Sin conductor · Asígnelo en PilotOS: No driver · Assign it in PilotOS
Tarjeta central, más grande, con corona: Central, larger card with a crown and a golden border. It shows name, score and percentile within the fleet.
Todos los indicadores se actualizan auto: All indicators update automatically when you change the date period or the vehicle/driver filters.
Use el plan como guión para la conversac: Use the plan as a script for the conversation with the driver. Show the specific pattern detected.
Uso del teléfono, fatiga, somnolencia o: Phone use, fatigue, drowsiness or unfastened seatbelt. Generates a double-tone sound and a red background in the panel.
al final. Verá una pantalla de login dif: at the end. You will see a different login screen where you sign in with your email and password.
basadas en estadísticas globales de efic: based on global efficiency statistics. They do not replace real consumption telemetry. Their purpose is to quantify the impact of behavior to motivate improvement.
de conducción brusca al inicio, lo cual: of harsh driving at the start, which is the goal: to make visible behaviors that in another type of operation could go unnoticed.
en la barra de navegación de secciones (: in the section navigation bar (just below the main menu). You can also select it from the bottom menu on mobile.
en la barra de secciones (menú secundari: in the section bar (secondary menu) or in the bars icon of the bottom menu on mobile.
in the section bar (secondary menu). The section appears between "Analysis" and "Events".
es el portal de identidad de conductores: is the platform's driver identity portal. A driver has a single username and password that works in DriveIQ, InspectPro and all the apps in the ecosystem.
normaliza la cantidad de incidentes por: normalizes the number of incidents by distance traveled, giving a fair comparison.
o desde el enlace que usted les comparta: or from the link you share with them. They use their email and password.
que guarda en caché los archivos estátic: that caches the static files. This lets you open the app even with no internet, although the fleet data will not be available until the connection is restored.
son usuarios adicionales que solo ven lo: are additional users who only see the vehicles and drivers assigned to them — useful when there are different zones, shifts or group managers.
su propia flota, en su propio país: your own fleet, in your own country
Útil al navegar secciones largas (Rankin: Useful when navigating long sections (Ranking, Coaching, Analysis) to return to the menu without having to scroll.
en Colombia comunica de inmediato de qué: in Colombia it immediately makes clear which vehicle is being referred to, with no need to interpret it. The name does not affect the threshold calculation or the score — it only changes how it is shown on screen and in exported documents.
Los perfiles sectoriales ajustan automát: Sector profiles automatically adjust the thresholds of the relevant vehicle types according to the specific demands of each operating sector. They are a starting point designed for high-responsibility environments.
Aplicable a cualquier vehículo que trans: Applicable to any vehicle that transports students. The thresholds are the strictest in the system: any abrupt maneuver poses a direct risk to passengers. Also recommended for university and staff transport.
Para vehículos que transportan sustancia: For vehicles that transport substances classified as hazardous: fuels, chemicals, pressurized liquids or explosive materials. The risk is not only to the driver — any abrupt maneuver can trigger a spill, explosion or chemical emergency. The thresholds are the lowest in the system.
DriveIQ analiza automáticamente el histo: DriveIQ automatically analyzes each driver's history and generates a personalized set of recommendations based on their real patterns: which type of event they commit most, at what time of day, whether they drive at night and how often. It is not a generic message — each plan reflects that specific driver's behavior.
Si no hay odómetro, el sistema calcula l: If there is no odometer, the system calculates the distance by summing the distances between the GPS positions of the vehicle's consecutive events. It is a minimum estimate — the actual distance is always greater.
Una vez autenticado, el supervisor ve Dr: Once authenticated, the Supervisor sees DriveIQ with an orange banner at the top showing their name and how many vehicles are assigned to them. They will only see data for those vehicles and their drivers. The supervisor management sections are not available to them.
Son configuraciones de umbrales prediseñ: These are pre-designed threshold configurations for operating sectors where safety demands go beyond the general standard. Not all vehicles carry the same level of responsibility: driving a truck with hazardous cargo or a school bus involves radically different consequences in the event of any abrupt maneuver.
En este sector, una frenada brusca puede: In this sector, harsh braking can cause falls inside the vehicle, impacts against the seats or injuries to children who are not always wearing a seatbelt. The thresholds are the strictest in the system.
Para vehículos que transportan materiale: For vehicles that transport materials classified as hazardous: fuels, chemicals, pressurized gases, explosives or any substance whose spill poses a risk to people, infrastructure or the environment.
En este sector el riesgo no recae únicam: In this sector the risk does not fall on the driver alone. An abrupt maneuver can cause the cargo to shift, a leak, a fire or a chemical emergency. The thresholds are the lowest in the system.
Las carreteras de montaña exigen frenada: Mountain roads require braking that would be considered harsh on flat highways. A fleet operating on unpaved roads will record naturally different values than one driving on urban corridors. A night freight driver has a different profile than a daytime distribution driver.
El nombre personalizado reemplaza al téc: The custom name replaces the technical one in tables, reports and exported documents. This means that reports shared with drivers, supervisors or clients are written in the vocabulary everyone recognizes, with no need to interpret it.
{a} de {v} vehículos con actividad en el: {a} of {v} vehicles active in the period ({p}%)
La mayoría de sus eventos se concentran: Most of your events are concentrated around {h}:00. If this matches peak traffic hours, planning alternative routes or leaving 15 min earlier can cut events in half.
* Valores de referencia basados en flota: * Reference values based on fleets in the {sector} sector. Your fleet data is calculated over the loaded period.
Anticipe el tráfico con más distancia. A: Anticipate traffic with more distance. Accelerate gradually instead of flooring it — fuel consumption drops by up to 15% and brake wear decreases.
Mantenga distancia de seguridad de al me: Keep a safe distance of at least 3 seconds from the vehicle ahead. Anticipate traffic lights and slow down before reaching them.
Reduzca velocidad antes de ingresar a la: Slow down before entering the curve, not during it. Turn the wheel smoothly and keep a stable path to avoid rollovers.
Salir 10 minutos antes reduce la necesid: Leaving 10 minutes earlier reduces the need to make up time with speed. The risk of a serious accident quadruples when exceeding the limit by more than 20 km/h.
Más del 30% de sus eventos ocurren entre: More than 30% of your events occur between 20:00 and 06:00. The risk of a nighttime accident is 3× higher due to fatigue and lower visibility. Consider mandatory breaks or shift rotation.
El conductor no muestra patrones de ries: The driver shows no predominant risk patterns in the period. Maintain the pace and reinforce positively.
